backup.title: Backup
backup.field.file.label: Backup file (optional if a default folder is set)
backup.field.file.placeholder: Leave empty to use the default backup folder
backup.field.passphrase.label: Passphrase (optional — leave empty for an unencrypted backup)
backup.progress.defaultFolder: No file chosen — using the default folder: {0}
backup.error.noFile: Choose a file to write to, or set a default backup folder in Settings ▸ Plugins.
restore.title: Restore from backup
restore.field.file.label: Backup file
restore.field.passphrase.label: Passphrase (only if the backup is encrypted)
restore.progress.complete: Restore complete. Reconnect or refresh the tree to see the data.
restore.error.noFile: Choose a backup file to restore.
restore.error.crossEngine: This backup is from {0}; restoring to a different engine isn't supported yet.
restore.error.wrongPassphrase: Wrong passphrase or corrupted backup file.
